'''Pike Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that served with the [[True Invids]] under renegade [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Leonia Tavira]]. It was one of the three [[Clutch (fighter)|clutch]] squadrons stationed aboard the ''[[Invidious]]'', and participated in the [[Battle of Xa Fel (11 ABY)|Battle of Xa Fel]] alongside a similar unit from the [[Khuiumin Survivors]].

==Appearances==
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

[[Category:Pirate squadrons]]
